entry.title: Dockfile Knowledge
entry.content:
Recap and cheat sheet

## List Docker CLI commandsdockerdocker container --help## Display Docker version and infodocker --versiondocker versiondocker info## Execute Docker imagedocker run hello-world## List Docker imagesdocker image ls## List Docker containers (running, all, all in quiet mode)docker container lsdocker container ls --alldocker container ls -aq

entry.title: 气象数据处理
entry.content:
SRAD-2018 气象数据处理程序
气象数据着色
import numpy as npimport cv2import osimport syspath='/data3/shuliang/strong'newpath='/data3/shuliang/strong1'files=os.listdir(path)for y in range(len(files)):    if os.path.exists(path+'/'+files[y]+'/'+'ground_truth.gif'):        os.remove(path+'/'+files[y]+'/'+'ground_truth.gif')    os.mkdir(newpath+'/'+files[y])    newfiles=os.listdir(path+'/'+files[y])    for x in range(len(newfiles)):        gray1=cv2.imread(path+'/'+files[y]+'/'+newfiles[x])        gray=gray1[:,:,0]        r=gray.copy()        g=gray.copy()        b=gray.copy()        for i in range(501):            for j in range(501):                if gray[i][j]<=10 and gray[i][j]>=0:                    r[i][j]=255                    g[i][j]=245                    b[i][j]=0                elif gray[i][j]<=15 and gray[i][j]>10 :                    r[i][j]=255                    g[i][j]=191                    b[i][j]=0                elif gray[i][j]<=20 and gray[i][j]>15:                    r[i][j]=255                    g[i][j]=0                    b[i][j]=0                elif gray[i][j]<=25 and gray[i][j]>20:                    r[i][j]=0                    g[i][j]=255                    b[i][j]=0                elif gray[i][j]<=30 and gray[i][j]>25:                    r[i][j]=0                    g[i][j]=205                    b[i][j]=0                elif gray[i][j]<=35 and gray[i][j]>30:                    r[i][j]=0                    g[i][j]=139                    b[i][j]=0                elif gray[i][j]<=40 and gray[i][j]>35:                    r[i][j]=0                    g[i][j]=255                    b[i][j]=255                elif gray[i][j]<=45 and gray[i][j]>40:                    r[i][j]=0                    g[i][j]=215                    b[i][j]=255                elif gray[i][j]<=50 and gray[i][j]>45 :                    r[i][j]=63                    g[i][j]=133                    b[i][j]=205                elif gray[i][j]<=55 and gray[i][j]>50:                    r[i][j]=0                    g[i][j]=0                    b[i][j]=255                elif gray[i][j]<=60 and gray[i][j]>55:                    r[i][j]=34                    g[i][j]=34                    b[i][j]=178                elif gray[i][j]<=65 and gray[i][j]>60:                    r[i][j]=0                    g[i][j]=0                    b[i][j]=139                elif gray[i][j]<=70 and gray[i][j]>65:                    r[i][j]=255                    g[i][j]=0                    b[i][j]=255                elif gray[i][j]<=75 and gray[i][j]>60:                    r[i][j]=255                    g[i][j]=48                    b[i][j]=155                elif gray[i][j]>75:                    r[i][j]=250                    g[i][j]=250                    b[i][j]=255                else:                    print('wrong')        rgb = np.zeros((gray1.shape)).astype("uint8")        rgb[:,:,0]=r        rgb[:,:,1]=g        rgb[:,:,2]=b        cv2.imwrite(newpath+'/'+files[y]+'/'+newfiles[x],rgb)
筛选雨天图片
import numpy as npimport osimport sysimport shutilimport osimport cv2import argparsedef build_arg_parser():    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description='Compress the input image \            using clustering')    parser.add_argument("--train", dest="train", required=True, type=str)    parser.add_argument("--output", dest="output", required=True, type=str)    return parserargs = build_arg_parser().parse_args()train_path = args.trainoutput_path = args.output# train_path = "/data1/weather1/train21_60"train_folder = os.listdir(train_path)for data in range(len(train_folder)):    if os.path.exists(output_path + '/' + train_folder[data]) == False:        os.makedirs(output_path + '/' + train_folder[data])    filepath = train_path+"/"+train_folder[data]    files = os.listdir(filepath)    files = sorted(files, key=lambda x: int(x[-15:]))    for index in range(len(files)):        print(data, index)        new_filepath = filepath+"/"+files[index]        images = os.listdir(new_filepath)        if 'Thumbs.db' in images:            images.remove('Thumbs.db')        images = sorted(images, key=lambda x: int(x[-6:-4]))        img_first_path = new_filepath+"/"+images[0]        img_last_path = new_filepath+"/"+images[30]        a = cv2.imread(img_first_path)        a = a[:, :, 0]        counta = 0        for rowa in range(501):            for cola in range(501):                if a[rowa][cola] < 255:                    counta += 1        b = cv2.imread(img_last_path)        b = b[:, :, 0]        countb = 0        for rowb in range(501):            for colb in range(501):                if b[rowb][colb] < 255:                    countb += 1        try:            if counta > 30000 and countb > 30000:                shutil.move(new_filepath, output_path + '/' + train_folder[data])        except:            continue
生成雨天的rec 图片（rec 用于mxnet 网络）
import mxnet as mximport osimport subprocessimport numpy as npimport reimport matplotlibmatplotlib.use('Agg')import matplotlib.pyplot as pltimport cv2import randomimport timeimport shutilimport pickleimport argparsedef separate_train_valid(dir_path, valid_dir_path, train_proportion=0.95):    """    Assumes directory structure: dir_path has folders named TRAIN_#, each TRAIN_# contains folders    of image sequences.    This function randomly selects train_proportion of them to remain in original set, while move the    others to VALID_# under valid_dir_path    """    if not os.path.exists(valid_dir_path):        os.mkdir(valid_dir_path)    train_folders = os.listdir(dir_path)    valid_folders = [folder_name.replace('TRAIN', 'VALID') for folder_name in train_folders]    train_folders = [os.path.join(dir_path, folder_name) for folder_name in train_folders]    valid_folders = [os.path.join(valid_dir_path, folder_name) for folder_name in valid_folders]    for train_folder, valid_folder in zip(train_folders, valid_folders):        if not os.path.exists(valid_folder):            os.mkdir(valid_folder)        seq_names = os.listdir(train_folder)        for seq_name in seq_names:            if random.random() > train_proportion:                shutil.move(os.path.join(train_folder, seq_name), os.path.join(valid_folder, seq_name))def generate_rec(data_path, prefix_path, do_shuffle, num_parts, seq_len):    #seqlen=31 or 61    # transform into .lst file    im2rec_path = mx.test_utils.get_im2rec_path()    with open(os.devnull, 'wb') as devnull:        subprocess.check_call(['python', im2rec_path, '--list', '--recursive', '--test-ratio=0.2', prefix_path, data_path],                            stdout=devnull)    # sort the lst file    if num_parts == 1:        with open(prefix_path+'.lst', 'r+') as f:            f.seek(0)            lines = f.readlines()            lines.sort(key=lambda line:re.split(r'\s+', line)[-2])            f.seek(0)            f.writelines(lines)        # generate record file        with open(os.devnull, 'wb') as devnull:            subprocess.check_call(['python', im2rec_path, '--num-thread=4', '--pass-through', '--test-ratio=0.2', prefix_path, data_path],                            stdout=devnull)if __name__ == '__main__':    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()    parser.add_argument('--mission_type', dest='mission_type', help='train or predict', default='train')    parser.add_argument('--data_path', dest='data_path', help='the path for data')    parser.add_argument('--rec_prefix', dest='rec_prefix')    parser.add_argument('--rec_prefix_valid', dest='rec_prefix_valid', default='//')    args = parser.parse_args()    if args.mission_type == 'train':        #assert args.rec_prefix_valid != '//'        #separate_train_valid(args.data_path, args.data_path+'_valid')        generate_rec(args.data_path, args.rec_prefix, do_shuffle=False, num_parts=1, seq_len=30)        #generate_rec(args.data_path+'_valid', args.rec_prefix_valid, do_shuffle=True, num_parts=1, seq_len=30)    elif args.mission_type == 'predict':        generate_rec(args.data_path, args.rec_prefix, do_shuffle=False, num_parts=1, seq_len=15)    else:        raise(IOError)
Test_rain_gen.py
import numpy as npimport osimport sysimport shutilimport osimport cv2import argparsedef build_arg_parser():    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description='Compress the input image \            using clustering')    parser.add_argument("--input", dest="input", required=True, type=str)    parser.add_argument("--output", dest="output", required=True, type=str)    return parserargs = build_arg_parser().parse_args()input_filepath = args.inputoutput_filepath = args.outputif not os.path.exists(output_filepath):    os.mkdir(output_filepath)print(input_filepath)print(output_filepath)filepath = input_filepathfiles = os.listdir(filepath)files = sorted(files, key=lambda x: int(x[-15:]))for index in range(len(files)):    print(index)    new_filepath = filepath+"/"+files[index]    images = os.listdir(new_filepath)    if 'Thumbs.db' in images:        images.remove('Thumbs.db')    if "RAD_Thumbs.db" in images:        images.remove("RAD_Thumbs.db")    images = sorted(images, key=lambda x: int(x[-6:-4]))    img_first_path = new_filepath+"/"+images[0]    img_last_path = new_filepath+"/"+images[30]    a = cv2.imread(img_first_path)    a = a[:, :, 0]    counta = 0    for rowa in range(501):        for cola in range(501):            if a[rowa][cola] < 255:                counta += 1    b = cv2.imread(img_last_path)    b = b[:, :, 0]    countb = 0    for rowb in range(501):        for colb in range(501):            if b[rowb][colb] < 255:                countb += 1    try:        if counta > 30000 and countb > 30000:            print('find one')            shutil.move(new_filepath, output_filepath)    except:        continue

entry.title: 气象数据预处理
entry.content:
去掉前缀
import numpy as npimport osimport shutilimport sysfiles=os.listdir('First')index=0for file in files:    index+=1    print(index)    os.rename('First/'+file,'First/'+file[10:])
去除无用数据
import numpy as npimport osimport shutilimport sysfiles=os.listdir('First')newfile=sorted(files, key=lambda x: x[:12])filelist=[]total=len(newfile)print(total)index=0while index < total:    print(index)    if index==total-1:        filelist.append(newfile[index])        index+=1    else:        first=newfile[index][:12]        second=newfile[index+1][:12]        if first==second:            index11=newfile[index].find('2500_')            index12=newfile[index].find('.ref')            index21=newfile[index+1].find('2500_')            index22=newfile[index+1].find('.ref')            number1=int(newfile[index][index11+5:index12])            number2=int(newfile[index+1][index21+5:index22])            if number1<number2:                filelist.append(newfile[index+1])            else:                filelist.append(newfile[index])            index+=2        else:            filelist.append(newfile[index])            index+=1if not os.path.exists('Second'):    os.makedirs('Second')for i in filelist:    os.rename('First/'+i,'First/'+i[:12]+'.ref')    try:        shutil.move('First/'+i[:12]+'.ref',"Second/")    except:        print('Here')print('Done!')
生成图片
import  numpy as npimport osimport cv2import sysif not os.path.exists('Third'):    os.makedirs('Third')index=0files=os.listdir('Second')for file in files:    index+=1    print(index)    png = np.fromfile('Second/'+file, dtype=np.uint8).reshape(700, 900)    resize_png=png[100:601,200:701]    mask=(resize_png==125)    resize_png=255*mask+(1-mask)*resize_png    start=0    end=file.find('.ref')    cv2.imwrite('Third/'+file[start:end]+'.png',resize_png)
分组
import  numpy as npimport osimport cv2import shutilif not os.path.exists('Dataset'):        os.makedirs('Dataset')files=os.listdir('Third')print(len(files))images=sorted(files, key=lambda x: x[:12])fileindex=0for i in range(476):    print(i)    os.mkdir('Dataset/'+str(fileinludex))    for j in range(15*i,15*i+61):        shutil.copy('Third/'+images[j],'Dataset/'+str(fileindex))    fileindex+=1
重命名
import  numpy as npimport osimport cv2import shutilpath='Dataset'files=os.listdir(path)for i in range(len(files)):    subfiles=os.listdir(path+'/'+files[i])    resort=sorted(subfiles, key=lambda x: x[:12])    for j in range(len(resort)):        os.rename(path+'/'+files[i]+'/'+resort[j],path+'/'+files[i]+'/'+str(j).zfill(2)+'.png')
去掉前缀
import numpy as npimport osimport shutilimport sysfiles=os.listdir('First')index=0for file in files:    index+=1    print(index)    os.rename('First/'+file,'First/'+file[10:])
翻倍生成
import  numpy as npimport osimport cv2import shutilpath='Dataset'files=os.listdir(path)#os.remove('Dataset/.DS_Store')dirs=sorted(files, key=lambda x: int(x))for i in range(1192):    shutil.copytree(path+'/'+str(i),path+'/'+str(i+3808))
查看像素值
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt # plt 用于显示图片import matplotlib.image as mpimg # mpimg 用于读取图片import numpy as nplena = mpimg.imread('Dataset/0/00.png') # 读取和代码处于同一目录下的 lena.png# 此时 lena 就已经是一个 np.array 了，可以对它进行任意处理lena.shape #(512, 512, 3)plt.imshow(lena) # 显示图片plt.axis('off') # 不显示坐标轴plt.show()
思路

700✖️900 转换为501✖️501，做edge map

Main 函数文件
  1. 同一个np.random.seed() 下产生的随机数相同
Mxnet
mx.nd.reshape([-1,0])-1 表示 重新计算所在维度0  表示 所在维度不变换
Np.clip()
截取两端，超出的部分强制为边界。
刚上来maxpooling 到167*167

entry.title: Opencv常用code
entry.content:
改变大小
import cv2img=cv2.resize(img,(320,320),interpolation=cv2.INTER_LINEAR)img=cv2.resize(img,(320,320),interpolation=cv2.INTER_NEAREST)
读写
img=cv2.imread(path+"/"+files[i])cv2.imwrite(path+"/"+files[i],img)
查看形状
image.shape

entry.title: Linux常用code
entry.content:
linux 显示文件数目
ls |wc -l
解压打包文件夹
解包：tar zxvf FileName.tar打包：tar czvf FileName.tar DirName
github 板块
git add .git commit -m 'messgae'git push
hexo 板块
hexo cleanhexo ghexo d
管理员必备
如何查看Linux中各个用户使用的存储空间大小：
sudo du -sh /home/*df -h
开放端口

Scp 传输
scp -P 20711 -r /data3/shuliang/source_code/szo_data shuliang@180.168.160.138:/home/shuliang
Anaconda 安装使用
# Install condaRUN curl -o ~/miniconda.sh -O  https://repo.continuum.io/miniconda/Miniconda3-latest-Linux-x86_64.sh  &&\    chmod +x ~/miniconda.sh &&\    ~/miniconda.sh -b -p /opt/conda &&\    rm ~/miniconda.sh &&\    /opt/conda/bin/conda install numpy pyyaml scipy ipython mkl mkl-include &&\    /opt/conda/bin/conda clean -yaENV PATH /opt/conda/bin:$PATH# Conda environmentRUN conda create -n habitat python=3.6
查看cuda版本
cat /usr/local/cuda/version.txtcat /usr/local/cuda/include/cudnn.h | grep CUDNN_MAJOR -A 2
FTP 下载文件
wget ftp://121.15.170.100  --ftp-user=gzw --ftp-password=gzw@20190520 -r
CUDA 安装教程
$  wget https://developer.download.nvidia.com/compute/cuda/repos/ubuntu1804/x86_64/cuda-ubuntu1804.pin$  sudo mv cuda-ubuntu1804.pin /etc/apt/preferences.d/cuda-repository-pin-600$  sudo apt-key adv --fetch-keys https://developer.download.nvidia.com/compute/cuda/repos/ubuntu1804/x86_64/7fa2af80.pub$  sudo add-apt-repository "deb http://developer.download.nvidia.com/compute/cuda/repos/ubuntu1804/x86_64/ /"$  sudo apt-get update$  sudo apt-get -y install cuda
